hooks.command: r="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}}"; [ -n "$r" ] || r="$(ls -d "$HOME"/.codex/plugins/cache/*/litestar/*/ 2>/dev/null | sort -V | tail -n1)"; r="${r:-.}"; CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT="${r%/}" bash "${r%/}/hooks/session-start.sh"
hooks.description: Inject project-aware Litestar skill reminders into the Codex CLI session context.
